title: The Tea Party Invitation
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on the tea party invitation within the Tea Party Invitation storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What-?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A shocking declaration brings chaos in its wake...

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: At the tea party...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Drop

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji's gonna get married!?

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Groom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Smolder

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why now, of all times...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Like I'm supposed to know what the hell is going on in your family.

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: V-Vinsmoke!? So that's Sanji's last name?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: that name sends a bit of a chill down my spine...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No... it can't be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the hell, bastard !?

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: You tryna burn down my castle!?

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Hey, Sanji! What's the meaning of all this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are you really gonna get married!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Who in the world is behind this Harebrained scheme!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Your family, you dumbass.

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: For a son of the Vinsmokes,

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: It sure don't look like you were groomed properly. Hehehe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 01. More wine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes Sir.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji's family?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "Liar Norland"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Speaking of which...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: You've heard of it, Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But this says it was printed in North Blue!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well, I was born in North Blue, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I never knew that. I thought you were born and brought up in East Blue Like Us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well, I was brought u- you know what, don't worry about it.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Even though we met Sanji in East Blue,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He did mention how he was born in North Blue.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And come to think of it, I always thought some- thing smelled fishy about the whole story...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wait a second!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's actually a huge deal, Nami-san!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: To go from North Blue to East Blue,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: One MUST cross the red line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Exactly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's not your average family relocation. It's a full-blown voyage!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji- San... Just how in the world were you raised !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: More import- rantly,

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: If you knuckleheads haven't realized it yet, Charlotte is big mom's last name! Don't tell me this jerk's bride...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is one of big mom's daughters!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: What!? Sanji, does that mean you're gonna become family of one of the yonkou!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's more, if this guy, your crewmember, becomes big mom's relative through marriage, that means you lot become de facto underlings in her crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: EHWH!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't get ahead of yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: I have no obligation whatsoever to go to this tea party!

summary: The Tea Party Invitation: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
